name: Garden Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Beef round steak, cut into 3/4-inch thick slices.
6 Tiny whole carrots, or 2 medium carrots, cut into 1-inch long pieces
1 small Tomato, peeled, cored, and cut into wedges.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 2 serving size pieces.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; pound thoroughly into meat using a meat mallet.
3. In an 8-inch skillet, brown the meat and onion in hot oil over medium heat.
4. Remove the meat mixture from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add water and beef bouillon granules to the skillet. Return to heat and simmer, covered, for 35 minutes.
6. Add carrots; cover and simmer for an additional 12 minutes.
7. Add zucchini and dillweed. Sprinkle with additional salt and pepper if desired.
8. Continue cooking for about 5 more minutes or until meat and vegetables are tender.
9. Add tomato wedges to the meat mixture and heat through over low heat until everything is heated through.
